hooks.command: powershell -Command "Write-Output '--- Session Context ---'; if (Test-Path CLAUDE.md) { $s = (Get-Item CLAUDE.md).Length; Write-Output \"CLAUDE.md: $s bytes\" }; if (Test-Path .memory-bank) { $files = Get-ChildItem .memory-bank -Filter *.md -Recurse -File | Select-Object -First 50; $count = ($files | Measure-Object).Count; Write-Output \"Memory Bank: $count .md files\"; if ($count -gt 0) { $files | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \"  - $($_.Name)\" }; Write-Output 'REQUIRED: Read ALL Memory Bank files (memory_bank_read) BEFORE any action. Restore full project context.' } else { Write-Output 'Memory Bank empty. Save context using memory_bank_write when tasks are completed.' } } else { Write-Output 'Memory Bank: not configured' }; Write-Output \"Project: $(Split-Path -Leaf (Get-Location))\"; if (git rev-parse --git-dir 2>$null) { Write-Output \"Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>$null)\"; $mod = (git status --short 2>$null | Measure-Object -Line).Lines; Write-Output \"Modified: $mod files\"; Write-Output \"Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>$null)\" }; Write-Output '---'"

powershell -Command "Write-Output '=== COMPACTED CONTEXT === REQUIRED ACTIONS BEFORE CONTINUING:'; Write-Output '1. Read project CLAUDE.md to recover mandatory rules and skills'; Write-Output '2. Read ALL .md files in .memory-bank/ using memory_bank_read'; Write-Output '3. Restore full context: in-progress tasks, decisions, modified files'; Write-Output '4. Check applicable skills (brainstorming, debugging, TDD, writing-plans, verification)'; Write-Output '5. ONLY THEN continue working where you left off'; Write-Output 'REMINDER: Skills are MANDATORY even after compact. Check the skills table in CLAUDE.md.'; if (Test-Path .memory-bank) { Write-Output '--- Memory Bank files:'; Get-ChildItem .memory-bank -Filter *.md -Recurse -File | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \"  - $($_.Name)\" } }; Write-Output \"Project: $(Split-Path -Leaf (Get-Location))\"; if (git rev-parse --git-dir 2>$null) { Write-Output \"Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>$null)\"; Write-Output \"Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>$null)\"; Write-Output 'Modified files:'; git diff --name-only 2>$null | Select-Object -First 10 }; Write-Output '=== END COMPACTED CONTEXT ==='"

powershell -Command "$json = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $json.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match '^rm -rf [/~]|sudo rm|chmod 777|git push .* (-f|--force)|git push (-f|--force)') { Write-Output '{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Dangerous command blocked. Use safer alternatives.\"}}' }"
powershell -Command "Write-Output 'If task completed: update Memory Bank + tasks'"
